generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why some people worry about civil defense prep being 'big government overreach', but honestly, in today's world, it's just common sense. My neighborhood just did a community drill last month - it was actually really empowering! We're not talking about military secrets here, just basic preparedness that could save lives. Why shouldn't we have that? #CommunityResilience #SafetyFirst
